extracted_json.title: Step 3 of the SPSP: Execute the Plan — Structural Map (Five Forces)

blocks.text: Step 3 of the SPSP : Execute the plan

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Step 1 of executing the SPSP: building a Five Forces structural map of the 1980s PC industry.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Notes on Step 3 (Execute the plan) of the SPSP, beginning with Step 1: creating a structural map, illustrated with a Five Forces diagram of the 1980s Personal Computer Industry. The diagram maps Competitors (F1: rivalry) against New entrants (F2, barriers to entry; Compaq, NCR), Suppliers (F4 supplier power; microprocessor Intel/AMD, OS Microsoft, storage Seagate), Buyers (F5 buyer power; consumers, enterprises), and Substitutes (F3, barriers to entry; pen computing GO/Apple, PDA Palm), with PC competitors IBM, HP, Dell, Apple noted.

transcription:
Step 3 of the SPSP : Execute the plan

  Step 1 :  Create a structural map ....
              ( e.g. Personal Computer Industry)
                            1980s

[figure]
